title: HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management to individuals living with HIV and AIDS. This program provides HIV testing, expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing and rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 1109 June Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 386-1115 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 386-1115 Main phone Intake (541) 386-1115 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an intake appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, other languages available through Language Link AREA SERVED: Hood River County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Case/Care Management * AIDS/HIV Issues Dental Care Referrals * AIDS/HIV Health Insurance Premium Assistance * AIDS/HIV HIV Testing Medical Care Expense Assistance * AIDS/HIV Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * AIDS/HIV Prescription Expense Assistance * AIDS/HIV Rent Payment Assistance * AIDS/HIV Transitional Housing/Shelter * AIDS/HIV Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BRIDGES TO HEALTH PATHWAYS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
